_comment: Centrally-managed per-repo Checkov exceptions. All entries require SWG approval and a documented justification per check. skip_check excludes a check entirely. Every other finding is severity-gated by default: it soft-fails (passes) unless Checkov's mapped severity is HIGH or CRITICAL. soft_fail_on is only needed as an override for a HIGH/CRITICAL finding you still want to soft-fail - it has no effect on LOW/MEDIUM/INFO findings, which always soft-fail regardless.

skip_check.justification: TODO: Link to SWG Confluence page
